creator: banezmesm@gmail.com
text:
Hello, I have the same problem. After I reloaded telegraf service and my freebsd machines, which ere about 10, rebooted with kernel panic. On the machines telegraf uptime was over 10 days.

Freebsd version: 14.1p5
telegraf version: 1.31_1 or 1.32

I got this log and it's the same for the machines.



Mar  6 10:41:23 test-fw01 kernel: Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
